name: Home vn
description:
1️⃣ Jacky – White Rabbit (Protagonist)

Age: 20
Occupation: Photography student / part-time newspaper intern
Appearance:
White fur, blue eyes, faded denim jacket, jeans, and a vintage camera always around his neck. White hair

Personality:
Quiet, anxious, creative, but determined. Jacky uses humor to hide emotional instability. He doubts himself often and blames himself for anything that goes wrong.

Background:
Jacky grew up in Bonita Springs but left for a while. Returning in 1985 feels like stepping into a memory he doesn’t fully recognize. His mother died when he was young; he avoids talking about it.

Horror Hook:
His camera begins capturing things that nobody else remembers—people who shouldn’t exist, events that never happened, shadows that stare. Jacky becomes unsure if he’s discovering truth... or creating it.

2️⃣ Alex – Tiger Shark Hybrid (Boyfriend)

Age: 21
Occupation: Mechanic assistant
Appearance:
Tall, broad-shouldered, ocean-blue shirt, jeans, tiger-striped shark tail. Eyes shift shade slightly depending on mood.

Personality:
Protective, calm, funny, physically confident—but emotionally distant when stressed.

Background:
Moved to Bonita Springs three years ago. Almost nobody knows where he lived before. Town rumors say he was involved in something violent, but he never addresses it.

Horror Hook:
Alex begins forgetting entire conversations with Jacky. Sometimes his voice on tape doesn’t match what he said. Eventually Jacky must wonder:
“Is Alex slipping away... or was he never real to begin with?”

3️⃣ Riley “Rye” Collins – Red Fox (Best Friend)

Age: 20
Occupation: Record store employee
Appearance:
Rough fur, messy hair, band shirts, ripped jeans, Walkman headphones worn like jewelry.

Personality:
Sarcastic, charismatic, jealous, deeply loyal to Jacky—maybe too loyal.

Background:
Riley and Jacky were inseparable as kids. Riley wanted more than friendship years ago but never spoke it aloud. He sees Alex as a threat, even if he pretends otherwise.

Horror Hook:
Riley hears familiar voices echoing through the radio static. The closer Jacky gets to the truth, the more Riley changes—sleep-walking, losing time, repeating phrases he swears he never said.

4️⃣ Mia Reyes – Bobcat (Friend)

Age: 19
Occupation: Diner waitress / part-time poet
Appearance:
Diner dress, eyeliner, shell bracelet, soft golden fur.

Personality:
Caring, intuitive, nervy, romantic, hopeful.

Background:
Mia grew up in a strict household obsessed with religion and control. She rejects it, but trauma remains. She trusts Jacky immediately, drawn to his loneliness.

Horror Hook:
Mia’s reflection stops matching her expression. She begins writing poetry about events before they happen. She claims she dreamed Alex long before Jacky met him.

5️⃣ Carter Hayes – Alligator (Friend)

Age: 22
Occupation: Boat repair worker
Appearance:
Large build, denim overalls, muddy boots, heavy tail dragging marks in dirt.

Personality:
Quiet, observant, slow-moving but sharp-thinking. Has a tender heart beneath his size.

Background:
Lives alone in a broken house near the swamp. Family vanished when he was young—no bodies found. Carter avoids talking to law enforcement and hates strangers.

Horror Hook:
Carter claims the swamp breathes and
